name: SL countermeasure map (CSV)
what_it_solves: Table mapping each SL vulnerability to the countermeasure(s) available (drug/mechanism/development stage).
how_it_solves: sl_countermeasure_map.csv — CSV consumed by the SL engine's kb/ and by the Ayesha bundle for 'what could we do' outputs.
why_it_exists: Explicit vulnerability→drug map avoids re-deriving countermeasures per case at request time.
